## vX.Y.Z

One short sentence that explains what users will feel in this release.

### What users will notice
- The first user-facing improvement
- The second user-facing improvement
- The third user-facing improvement

### Quality improvements
- A meaningful bug fix, safety fix, or reliability improvement
- Another fix that improved correctness, trust, or consistency

### Upgrade notes
- Mention only if users need to reinstall, update, or change behavior
- Omit this section if there is nothing special to do

### Verification
- `npm run build`
- `npm test -- --runInBand`
- Add only the runtime checks that were actually run for this release

### Writing rules
- Lead with user impact, not internal implementation
- Keep it short enough to scan in under a minute
- Do not invent percentages, guarantees, or claims that were not verified
- Use the same structure for every release unless there is a strong reason not to
